warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round PVC pipe
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
5 PVC Pass Throughs
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 Worlds Greatest Stretch
10 Cossack Squat
10 Broad Jumps
2 rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Muscle Clean
3 Clean Pull
3 Hang Power Clean
10 Front Squat

strength.name: Front Squat
strength.description:
3x2 | * Breathe and brace at the top of each rep
* Elbows Up
* Keep knees out | 24min
BUILD 4 Sets E3MOM
00:00 8 @ 50%
03:00 6 @ 65%
06:00 4 @ 75%
09:00 2 @ 85%
HOLD 3 Sets E4MOM
12:00 2 @ 90%
16:00 2 @ 90%
20:00 2 @ 90%

strength.name: Power Clean
strength.description:
1x2 | * Focus on triple extension
* Fast Elbows | E3MOM 15min
Work Up to a Top Set of 2. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.
00:00 2
03:00 2
06:00 2
09:00 2
12:00 2

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
EMOM x 9
Min 1: 150m run
Min 2: 40 Double Unders
Min 3: 8 Power Cleans @ 60/40
Scale the reps to finish the work in less than 45 seconds

hypertrophy.reasoning: Balance quad-dominant work; strengthen posterior chain and spinal stability without competing with metcon fatigue.

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Front Squat, 3 by 2 at 90 percent. Strength: Power Clean, 1 by 2. Metcon: EMOM. For hypertrophy, focus on back, glutes, hamstrings.
